title: More Quark Tooltip Attributes
description: Adds additional modded attributes to Quark's clientside Attribute Tooltips feature
body:
This resource pack adds icons to additional modded attributes, to be displayed with the Quark mod. It will do nothing without Quark and any supported mod installed.

Mods currently supported are:

- Oreganized
- Malum
- Sortilege
- Caverns & Chasms (some attributes cannot be properly displayed due to how they're coded)
- Galosphere
- Iron's Spells and Spellbooks (A very small portion currently)

Malum Spirit ward attribute texture provided by Sammysemicolon
